||spam.autos^
||duplicate-proof.example.com^$client=10.0.0.1,dnstype=a

||unsupported-proof.example.com^$future=value

||rewrite-proof.example.com^$dnsrewrite=1.2.3.4
/^regex-proof\.example\.com$/
